TextENGNew: According to Rika-chan, the Magatama of Fuwarazu's effects would wear off after a short delay.
changeReason: Original says 'wouldn't take effect until after a short period' (delay before onset); new says 'effects would wear off after a short delay' (delay before ending). The Japanese describes effects appearing with a time lag, so original is more accurate about onset timing.

TextENGNew: By the time we pried Rena off Irie-san and brought her outside the field, she had blinked a few times and returned to her usual self.
But if we dawdled, she'd start clinging to me next, so we couldn't afford to waste any time.
We each hopped on our bikes and raced toward the Furude Shrine.
``Haah, it's gotten pretty late already.``@k@vS07/03/330300185. This ol' man missed lunch and is absolutely starving.``
changeReason: Original 'this is really taking a while' misinterprets the Japanese いい時間になっちゃった which means 'it's gotten quite late'; new correctly translates the time reference.

TextENGNew: ``But it's a relief that everything's been settled safely!``@k@vS07/06/330600113. It might be rude to Rena-san, but these past two days were anything but boring!``
``Fun or terrifying -- either way, we got a glimpse of how fearsome Rena can really be!``
``Can't say I'm totally happy with how it ended, though--``
``...Oh?``@k@vS07/06/330600115. Didn't everything get resolved safely and smoothly?``@k@vS07/06/330600116. You're being a little strange there, Sis~.``
For some reason, Mion was puffing her cheeks in annoyance.@k ...Shion laughed and tried to soothe her with a "there, there." ...What was that about?
``...All right, Rena, Keiichi.``@k@vS07/05/330500187. Once you've purified your hands, the two of you need to pray.``@k@vS07/05/330500188. And keep praying until I say it's okay.``
``Got it.``@k@vS07/01/330100360. Come on, Rena, let's get this done quick and free ourselves!``@k@vS07/01/330100361. If we take too long, that weird power will kick in again!``
``Y-...yeah...``@k@vS07/02/330200318. ...Hau... Little by little, it's, um...``@k@vS07/02/330200319. ...starting to creep back in...``
``Hey, Rika-chan, this is bad! Hurry it up!``
``...I am hurrying, so just focus your mind on praying.``
``A-all right... Mmmgh...``
``...Hey, Keiichi-kun.``
``What?``
``Back there, when you... came to save me. Thank you.``
``As if I'd ever abandon a friend.``@k@vS07/01/330100366. You don't need to thank me for that.``
``...Yeah.``@k@vS07/02/330200323. ...What you said to me then... it made me kind of happy... kind of.``
``...When you said you'd rescue me.``@k@vS07/02/330200325. Those words alone... even though my head was all fuzzy... I heard them crystal clear.``@k@vS07/02/330200326. ...It made me happy.``
``I-I didn't mean anything special by it...``@k@vS07/01/330100368. It was just, you know, the situation called for it, like a standard hero line!``
``...Keiichi-kun, you want to get the magatama out of your body as soon as possible, right...?``
changeReason: Original correctly says 'stomach' matching Japanese お腹の中 (inside stomach/belly); new changes to vaguer 'body'.

TextENGNew: ``Of course.``@k@vS07/01/330100370. Who'd want some weird thing sitting in their stomach forever?``
changeReason: Original 'That's a dumb question' is dismissive; new 'Of course' is matter-of-fact. Japanese 何バカなこと言ってんだよ leans toward the original's dismissive/teasing tone.

TextENGNew: ``...R-...right.``@k@vS07/02/330200329. ...It would be a nuisance if... someone like Rena started clinging to you...``
``H-hey.``@k@vS07/01/330100372. Don't get the wrong idea...!``@k@vS07/01/330100373. I'm not rushing because I dislike you or anything.``
``...I mean, if the power kicks in again, you'll start, uh, getting clingy with me, right?``@k@vS07/01/330100375. And, well, I'm a guy, so I wouldn't exactly hate that, but...``
``Your feelings are just being toyed with... That's not fair.``

``...Think about it -- those aren't your real feelings, are they?``@k@vS07/01/330100378. That love-struck Rena should be directed at the person you genuinely fall for. It's wrong to have some supernatural power aim it at someone like me.``

``...Yeah, you're right.``@k@vS07/02/330200331. ...Oh, but, Keiichi-kun.``@k@vS07/02/330200332. Back during the maid showdown, did you hear Mii-chan and the others talking about how amazing it is that Rena adapts herself to her partner?``
changeReason: New adds 'Mii-chan and the others' specifying who was talking, matching the Japanese 魅ぃちゃんたち, while original just says 'the others'.

TextENGNew: ``...Yeah, more or less.``
...So Rena had been able to hear our conversation back then.
``I'm not just being humble... Anyone can put in the effort to be liked by the person they love.``@k@vS07/02/330200334. It's not some special power only Rena has.``
``...If the person you liked said they loved homemade cookies, Rena isn't the only one who'd want to learn to bake them.``
``Mii-chan, Shii-chan, Satoko-chan, Rika-chan -- they'd all feel the same way.``
``And of course, you have that power too, Keiichi-kun.``
``You think so?``
``But I get the thing about your cookies, at least. I really did think they were delicious when I tried them yesterday!``
``Th-thanks.``

``...And Rena doesn't always match herself to the other person, either.``@k@vS07/02/330200340. Sometimes, when she tries to pull them into her own world, she ends up dragging them in without thinking about whether it's a bother...``

``Ahaha, you mean the treasure hunting?``@k@vS07/01/330100383. Well, even I was taken aback at first!``@k@vS07/01/330100384. Finding out a normal-looking girl like you had a hobby like that was quite the surprise -- but it's become a good memory now.``
``...Yeah, I guess it would catch someone off guard.``@k@vS07/02/330200342. It's weird, isn't it...``@k@vS07/02/330200343. I probably shouldn't invite people along for that...``

``If the other person doesn't seem interested, it's probably better not to push it on them.``@k@vS07/01/330100386. Apparently there are a lot of guys out there who are too delicate for that sort of thing.``

``But don't get me wrong, all right?!``@k@vS07/01/330100388. I actually think it's fun!``@k@vS07/01/330100389. I even promised that if tomorrow's club activity ends early, we'd go treasure hunting together again.``

``Well, I'll keep going with you until you find the person you truly want to bring along on your treasure hunts.``@k@vS07/01/330100391. So don't worry, and leave the heavy lifting to me!``@k@vS07/01/330100392. Though I have to say, moving a refrigerator by myself might be a bit much. Ahahaha.``
``Hau... oh no...``@k@vS07/02/330200350. Keiichi-kun... The Magatama of Fuwarazu's power... it's welling up again...``
``Whoa, that's bad!``@k@vS07/01/330100394. Just focus on praying!``@k@vS07/01/330100395. Those feelings will fade in just a little while, so hang in there!``
``...Yeah.``@k@vS07/02/330200352. They'll fade away soon...``
``Honestly, what kind of god makes such an obnoxious treasure!``@k@vS07/01/330100397. They should think about the trouble they're causing!``
``...M-...maybe.``@k@vS07/02/330200354. ...But Rena thinks it was... a wonderful treasure...``

``When you truly, deeply love someone... but you need something to give you that one final push.``@k@vS07/02/330200356. ...I'm sure there have always been so many people like that, since ancient times.``
``...For people like that, it's a magical treasure that brought a lot of happiness.``
``Hmm.``@k@vS07/01/330100399. Well, if you're saying that as today's biggest victim, then I guess I can accept it.``
``Ah... um...... hau... I... I can't hold on...``
``Hey, Rika-chan, are you done yet?! Please hurry!!``
changeReason: Original 'again?!' implies frustration at repetition; new 'are you done yet?!' matches the Japanese まだかよ (aren't you done yet), asking about completion status.

TextENGNew: ``...I am hurrying! I'm going as fast as I can!``
``...Ke... Keiichi-kun... this might... um, might not be my real feelings...``@k@vS07/02/330200360. It might be the magatama's power, okay...?``
``W-well, Rena Ryuugu... really... really loves you, Keiichi-kun.``@k@vS07/02/330200362. ...Since this power will disappear soon... I just wanted to tell you that right now...``
``...Y-...you idiot.``@k@vS07/01/330100402. ...Don't let the magatama's power get the better of you...``@k@vS07/01/330100403. ...I might actually take you seriously.``
changeReason: Original 'You want to be true to yourself, right?' invents reassurance not in the Japanese; new 'I might actually take you seriously' correctly translates 本気にするだろ (I'll take it seriously/believe it).

TextENGNew: ``...Yeah.``@k@vS07/02/330200364. I hope the magatama's magic... wears off soon...``
(Because if it doesn't... then no matter how much courage these words took... they won't mean anything to him...)
``...Mii!``@k@vS07/05/330500192. Did you hear that, Satoko...!``@k@vS07/05/330500193. Rena just confessed to Keiichi, miiiii...!!``
``...Yes, I heard it loud and clear.``@k@vS07/04/330400263. It's a good thing that Keiichi-san and Rena-san get along, I suppose, but for some reason it makes me absolutely furious.``
``Rikaaa, what if we tell them it's part of the ritual and make them bunny-hop up and down the shrine steps~?``
``Thank goodness Mii didn't hear that.``@k@vS07/05/330500195. ...If she had, starting tomorrow Keiichi would be dragged into a hundred-game punishment game gauntlet.``
``...Why don't we just go ahead and tell Mion-san about it?``
``That would be amusing, but I think this sort of ammunition is best saved for a rainy day.``
``An emergency escape tool for desperate situations -- the most fearsome magic item of all.``@k@vS07/05/330500198. Nipah~♪``
``...Rika, you're quite the schemer, aren't you...?!``
``Hinamizawa has always been... such a small, insular world.``@k@vS07/05/330500200. ...I think something wonderful was needed here, every once in a while.``
``...That's why I believe my ancestors kept the Magatama of Fuwarazu all this time.``
``You're trying to wrap things up neatly, but.``@k@vS07/04/330400268. When you consider all the men weeping in the shadows of the couples this thing created, it's hard to celebrate wholeheartedly.``
``If you can't grant everyone's wish, then calling yourself the god of matchmaking seems rather arrogant, don't you think?``

``Mii, that's a harsh thing to say.``@k@vS07/05/330500203. Even gods have their limits.``@k@vS07/05/330500204. People who rely on gods and magical items from the start should first learn that putting in real effort matters most. Mii.``
``...Somehow, that sounds an awful lot like justifying a god's laziness.``
``Oh, that's right! Rika, you still haven't gotten your punishment game, have you?!``

``Shion-san said earlier that everything's all set up in the Sonozaki family's secret room, right?!``@k@vS07/04/330400273. Kasai-san has a car waiting at the bottom of the steps, so please look forward to what awaits you!``
``And of course, I shall personally accompany you there~! Oh ho ho ho!``
``S-Satoko needs medical treatment after this, so that takes priority!!!``
``Besides, the sins of our ancestors are not the sins of their descendants!!``@k@vS07/05/330500207. Only by letting bygones be bygones can we establish normal diplomatic relations!!``
``...H-hey, Satoko, Rika-chan.``@k@vS07/01/330100405. How long do we have to keep doing this?``

``Oh, I'm sorry.``@k@vS07/04/330400276. The ritual is apparently finished, so you should be fine now.``@k@vS07/04/330400277. Well then, next up is Rika's trial run -- in the tickle torture machine!!``
``Heh heh heh...!``@k@vS07/06/330600118. Rika-chama, brace yourself...?!``
``M-m-m-meeeeeeep!!!``
And so, with that somewhat haphazard conclusion, everything was settled peacefully.
...Or so it seemed.
